channel.title: AboutIAM - Identity & Access Management Academy
channel.description: Latest browser-native identity security simulators, vulnerability post-mortems, and standard CVE analysis.

item.title: New Security Tool: JWT Decoder — Inspect & Verify Tokens Online
item.description: Paste any JSON Web Token to instantly decode its header, payload, and signature, check expiry, and flag insecure algorithms — 100% client-side, nothing is uploaded.

item.title: New Security Tool: JWT Generator — Build & Sign Tokens (HS256/RS256)
item.description: Create and cryptographically sign JSON Web Tokens with custom claims using HS256, HS384, HS512, or RS256 — computed locally with the Web Crypto API.

item.title: New Security Tool: Base64 & Base64URL Encoder / Decoder
item.description: Encode or decode text, JSON, and files to Base64 or URL-safe Base64 (used by JWTs) instantly in your browser — no data ever leaves your device.

item.title: New Security Tool: SHA-256 & Hash Generator — Text and File Checksums
item.description: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes for text or files directly in your browser using the Web Crypto API — no uploads, ever.

item.title: New Security Tool: HMAC Generator & Verifier (SHA-256/SHA-1/SHA-512)
item.description: Compute and verify HMAC signatures with a shared secret key using SHA-1, SHA-256, or SHA-512 — the same primitive that signs your JWTs, run locally.

item.title: New Security Tool: UUID & ULID Generator (v4, v7, Bulk)
item.description: Generate cryptographically random UUIDv4, time-sortable UUIDv7, or ULID identifiers in bulk, with one-click copy — 100% client-side randomness.

item.title: New Security Tool: Password Generator & Entropy Strength Checker
item.description: Generate strong random passwords or passphrases with custom rules, and see the exact entropy bits and estimated crack time — computed locally.

item.title: New Security Tool: OAuth PKCE Code Generator (code_verifier / code_challenge)
item.description: Generate an RFC 7636-compliant PKCE code_verifier and S256 code_challenge, and build a full OAuth 2.0 authorization URL — no backend required.

item.title: New Security Tool: TOTP Generator & Verifier (RFC 6238 Authenticator Codes)
item.description: Generate live, time-based one-time passwords (TOTP) from any Base32 secret and verify 6-digit codes — the same algorithm behind Google Authenticator.

item.title: New Security Tool: LDAP Filter Builder — Visual RFC 4515 Query Composer
item.description: Compose valid LDAP search filters visually with AND/OR/NOT groups, then copy the exact RFC 4515 filter string — no directory connection needed.

item.title: New Security Tool: SCIM Payload Validator & Builder (RFC 7643/7644)
item.description: Validate or scaffold SCIM 2.0 User and Group JSON payloads against the core schema, with inline errors for missing or malformed attributes.

item.title: New Security Tool: Basic & Bearer Auth Header Decoder
item.description: Decode HTTP Basic Authentication headers to reveal the username/password, or inspect Bearer tokens — a quick, private, client-side debugging utility.

item.title: New Security Tool: bcrypt Hash Generator & Verifier Online
item.description: Hash passwords with bcrypt at a custom cost factor, or verify a password against an existing bcrypt hash — computed entirely client-side, in pure JavaScript.

item.title: New Security Tool: JWK to PEM Converter (and back) + Thumbprint
item.description: Convert RSA/EC JSON Web Keys (JWK) to PEM format and back, and compute the RFC 7638 JWK thumbprint — all cryptography runs in your browser.

item.title: New Security Tool: X.509 Certificate Decoder — Parse PEM Certs & CSRs
item.description: Decode X.509 certificates and PKCS#10 CSRs to view subject, issuer, validity dates, SANs, key usage, and fingerprints — parsed locally, never uploaded.

item.title: New Security Tool: SAML Decoder — Inspect SAMLRequest/Response & Metadata
item.description: Decode Base64/deflate-encoded SAMLRequest and SAMLResponse parameters, or pretty-print SP/IdP metadata XML — no server round-trip, fully client-side.

item.title: New Security Tool: SAML Metadata Builder — Generate SP & IdP Metadata XML
item.description: Visually configure compliant SAML 2.0 Service Provider (SP) or Identity Provider (IdP) XML metadata configurations, endpoints, certificates, and export completed files.

item.title: New Security Tool: SCIM Diff & Reconciliation Tool — Calculate Sync Drift
item.description: Input Identity Provider (IdP) and Service Provider (SP) user records to visually calculate attribute sync drift and programmatically generate standard-compliant SCIM PATCH reconciliation scripts.

item.title: New Security Tool: X.509 CSR Generator — Compile PKCS#10 Requests Online
item.description: Visually construct secure X.509 Certificate Signing Requests (CSR) with Subject DN attributes and SAN fields, generate browser-native private/public keys, and inspect their ASN.1 DER-parsed structure.

item.title: New Security Tool: SD-JWT Decoder — Selective Disclosure JWT Inspector
item.description: Decode Selective Disclosure JWTs (SD-JWT), reveal individual disclosures, and verify each digest binding against the issuer-signed JWT — entirely in-browser.

item.title: New Security Tool: WebAuthn / Passkey Assertion & Attestation Decoder
item.description: Decode clientDataJSON, authenticatorData, and CBOR attestationObject from a WebAuthn credential to inspect flags, counters, and public keys.

item.title: New Security Tool: DID Generator — Create a did:key Identifier
item.description: Generate an Ed25519 keypair entirely in your browser and derive its did:key decentralized identifier and DID document — no wallet, no blockchain.

item.title: New Security Tool: OAuth 2.0 / OIDC Request Builder & Handshake Debugger
item.description: Visually construct standard-compliant OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect authorization URLs and token exchange payloads with copyable curl commands.

item.title: New Security Tool: JWKS JSON Web Key Set Inspector
item.description: Parse, inspect, and validate public JSON Web Key Sets (JWKS) representing cryptographic signing keys used for JWT verification.

item.title: New Security Tool: ABAC & RBAC Client-Side Policy Evaluator
item.description: An interactive sandbox to evaluate custom JSON-based access policies against simulated user, device, and resource contexts.

item.title: New Security Tool: Diceware Passphrase & Entropy Strength Calculator
item.description: Compare standard character-shuffled passwords against word-based dictionary passphrases to calculate mathematical entropy bits and offline GPU cracking times.

item.title: New Security Tool: OIDC Discovery Document Auditor
item.description: Parse, visualize, and audit modern Identity Provider metadata profiles containing standard OIDC endpoint registries.

item.title: New Security Tool: Ansible Vault Encryptor & Decryptor
item.description: Encrypt or decrypt files and string secrets client-side using the standard Ansible Vault 1.1/1.2 AES-256 cipher format — 100% browser-native PBKDF2 + AES-CTR + HMAC-SHA256.

item.title: New Security Tool: Mozilla SOPS — GitOps Secrets Simulator
item.description: An interactive envelope encryption playground. Selectively encrypt specific configuration values in YAML or JSON files using simulated AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, or Age keys, preserving key paths for Git diffs.

item.title: New Security Tool: Hardware Key Ring & HSM Emulator
item.description: Generate, store, and execute asymmetric and symmetric cryptographic keys locally inside your browser's secure sandbox — emulating a corporate Hardware Security Module (HSM).

item.title: New Security Tool: Standards Conformance Checker — OIDC Discovery & SAML Metadata
item.description: Paste an OIDC discovery document or SAML 2.0 metadata XML and run an automated pass/fail checklist against required fields and structural rules — 100% client-side.

item.title: New Security Tool: PBKDF2 Key Derivation & Hash Verifier
item.description: Derive a key from a password using PBKDF2 with a configurable salt, iteration count, and hash function, and verify a password against a stored derived hash — all via the Web Crypto API.

item.title: New Security Tool: PEM Certificate Bundle Splitter & Chain Order Checker
item.description: Paste a multi-certificate PEM bundle (e.g. a fullchain.pem) to split it into individual certificates, inspect each one's subject/issuer/expiry, and check whether the leaf-to-root chain order is correct.

item.title: New Security Tool: DID Document Validator & Resolver Preview
item.description: Paste a Decentralized Identifier (DID) Document JSON and validate it against the W3C DID Core structural requirements, with a pretty-printed, field-by-field resolved preview.

item.title: Thales Launches Sovereign Cloud CIAM to Meet Toughest EU Privacy Mandates
item.description: Thales announces dedicated European sovereign data hosting regions for the OneWelcome Identity Platform, ensuring full GDPR compliance and isolated tenant directories for European banks and public institutions. (Source: Thales Official Blog)

item.title: Advisory: Wildcard Subdomains Exploited in Open OAuth Redirect Attacks
item.description: CISA warns organizations that lax wildcard validation in OAuth redirect URIs is actively being leveraged by threat actors to harvest authentication authorization codes. (Source: NIST / CISA Advisory)

item.title: Okta Enforces Default MFA and Device Attestation for Support Portal Admins
item.description: Following social engineering post-mortems, Okta mandates phishing-proof FIDO2 MFA and managed device posture attestation for all support-related administrative credentials. (Source: Okta Engineering Blog)

item.title: Draft RFC: Ephemeral TLS Session Bindings for Cross-Domain Tokens
item.description: A new draft proposes embedding TLS session hashes inside JWT claims to bind access tokens cryptographically to the TLS tunnel, preventing session cookie theft bypasses. (Source: IETF OAuth Working Group)

item.title: Critical Golden SAML Exploit Vectors Highlighted in Active Directory Configurations
item.description: Attackers compromising on-prem ADFS signing certificates can bypass all MFA to forge assertions of any user. Moving signing keys to HSMs prevents certificate extraction. (Source: MITRE Security Center)

item.title: CVE-2026-99182: Keycloak JWT Header Algorithm Confusions Bypass
item.description:
Vulnerability score: 8.8/10. A flaw in Keycloak’s token signature verification wrapper allowed an attacker to execute algorithm confusion attacks when verifying custom tokens signed with asymmetric public keys, leading to signature bypasses.
Remediation: Update to Keycloak version 26.1 or higher. Ensure that token validation libraries explicitly declare the exact expected signature algorithms (e.g., algorithms: ["RS256"]) and reject alternative types.

item.title: CVE-2025-44912: OAuth PKCE Bypass via S256 Verifier Truncation
item.description:
Vulnerability score: 7.5/10. Multiple open-source OAuth authorization libraries failed to validate the correct length constraints of the PKCE code_verifier, allowing hackers to forge codes using truncated or blank code_verifier parameters.
Remediation: Enforce minimum length requirements (43 to 128 characters) and character sets (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, -._~) on all incoming code_verifier validations as mandated by RFC 7636.
